race.comment: BON VADER (2) has been knocking on the door of a maiden victory with consecutive runner-up finishes this time in work and this is not an overly strong affair. Gets the reliable Vandyke/Maloney combination and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. UNDER ARREST (9) has placed two of three around this circuit and will be at peak fitness for this. Well placed to play a major role. HOPEFUL CAUSE (5) faces the starter for the first time but looked handy in a recent trial and won't need to be a superstar to be competitive against this lot. In the mix on debut. PARADISE AS USUAL (16) will find this much easier than a recent Listed attempt.
